One of the four great Latin Doctors of the Church.

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#section-one-p1` — teaches that Sacred Scripture contains all wisdom
  text: "St. Augustine, in his great work On Christian Doctrine, teaches that Sacred Scripture contains all wisdom necessary for salvation."
- `source.html#section-one-p3` — converted from Manichaeism by reading Paul
  text: "The reading of Paul was able not only to join the heretic Augustine to the orthodox"
